erally in an orbit which was practically a parabola with the sun
at the focus. There are several instances of comets breaking up into
two or more fragments. Thus we see an intimate connection between
comets and meteors. There are eighteen periodic comets whose
orbits reach out close to the orbit of Jupiter, two to Saturn, three
to Uranus and six to Neptune.... In 1811 there appeared one of the
most splendid comets. Its tail stretched over 25° of the sky and
measured in absolute length about 100 million miles. The great
comet of 1843 was seen in broad daylight in the vicinity of the sun.
Its tail measured 150 m. miles in length, ..The star Arcturus (Svatl)
was seen shining with unimpaired brilliancy through the densest
part of Donatt's comet of 1858 (pp. 99-104),
